options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Classic Mode: Every Item pickup increases fills a progress bar which gives location checks.

Explore Mode: Each environment will have location checks within each environment.
environments will be locked in the item pool until received.

options.name: victory
options.description:
Mithrix: Defeat Mithrix in Commencement
Voidling: Defeat the Voidling in The Planetarium (SOTV DLC required! Will select any if not enabled.)
Limbo: Defeat the Scavenger in Hidden Realm: A Moment, Whole
Falseson: Defeat False son and gift an item to the altar in Prime Meridian (SOTS DLC required! Will select any if not enabled.)
Any: Any victory in the game will count. See Final Stage Death for additional ways.

options.name: total_revivals
options.description: Total Percentage of `Dio's Best Friend` item put in the item pool.

options.name: start_with_revive
options.description: Start the game with a `Dio's Best Friend` item.

options.name: final_stage_death
options.description:
The following will count as a win if set to "true", and victory is set to "any":
Dying in Commencement.
Dying in The Planetarium.
Obliterating yourself
If not use the following to tell if final stage death will count:
Victory: mithrix - only dying in Commencement will count.
Victory: voidling - only dying in The Planetarium will count.
Victory: limbo - Obliterating yourself will count.
Victory: falseson - only dying in Prime Meridian will count.

options.name: dlc_sotv
options.description:
Enable if you are using Survivors of the Void DLC.
Affects environment availability for Explore Mode.
Adds Void Items into the item pool

options.name: dlc_sots
options.description:
Enable if you are using Seekers of the Storm DLC.
Affects environment availability for Explore Mode.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: item_pickup_step
options.description:
Number of items to pick up before an AP Check is completed.
Setting to 1 means every other pickup.
Setting to 2 means every third pickup. So on...

options.name: shrine_use_step
options.description:
Explore Mode:
Number of shrines to use up before an AP Check is completed.
Setting to 1 means every other pickup.
Setting to 2 means every third pickup. So on...

options.name: enable_trap
options.description: Allows Trap items in the item pool.

options.name: enable_lunar
options.description: Allows Lunar items in the item pool.

options.name: chests_per_stage
options.description: Explore Mode: The number of chest locations per environment.

options.name: shrines_per_stage
options.description: Explore Mode: The number of shrine locations per environment.

options.name: scavengers_per_stage
options.description: Explore Mode: The number of scavenger locations per environment.

options.name: scanner_per_stage
options.description: Explore Mode: The number of scanners locations per environment.

options.name: altars_per_stage
options.description: Explore Mode: The number of altars locations per environment.

options.name: require_stages
options.description: Add Stage items to the pool to block access to the next set of environments.

options.name: progressive_stages
options.description:
This will convert Stage items to be a progressive item. For example instead of "Stage 2" it would be
"Progressive Stage"

options.name: stage_variants
options.description:
Enable if you want to include stage variants in the environment pool.
Stages included are:
- Distant Roost (2)
- Titanic Plains (2)
SOTS DLC Enabled:
- Vicious Falls
- Shattered Abodes
- Golden Dieback

options.name: show_seer_portals
options.description: Shows Seer Portals at the teleporter to allow choosing the next environment.

options.name: total_locations
options.description: Classic Mode: Number of location checks which are added to the Risk of Rain playthrough.

options.name: item_weights
options.description:
Set Use Item Weight Presets to yes if you want to use one of these presets.
Preset choices for determining the weights of the item pool.
- New is a test for a potential adjustment to the default weights.
- Uncommon puts a large number of uncommon items in the pool.
- Legendary puts a large number of legendary items in the pool.
- Chaos generates the pool completely at random with rarer items having a slight cap to prevent this option being
too easy.
- No Scraps removes all scrap items from the item pool.
- Even generates the item pool with every item having an even weight.
- Scraps Only will be only scrap items in the item pool.
- Lunartic makes everything a lunar item.
- Void makes everything a void item.

options.name: item_pool_presets
options.description: Will use the item weight presets when set to true, otherwise will use the custom set item pool weights.

options.name: white_scrap
options.description:

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
